required_assets: minimal_fixture: Tiny dry-run workflow with explicit config, input manifest, and pinned environment boundary.
required_run_evidence: tool version and executable/package source
required_run_evidence: exact command line or workflow step
required_run_evidence: reference/index/database name and version when applicable
required_run_evidence: input file manifest and sample metadata boundary
required_run_evidence: logs, warnings, QC metrics, and failure messages
license_or_terms_note: Check license, EULA, citation, and institutional terms before execution.
compute_note: May require large references, GPU, HPC, or substantial local storage.
data_safety_note: Do not submit PHI, patient data, or unpublished data to external services.
stop_conditions: tool is unavailable in the current environment and no container/install plan is provided
version, command, reference/index, inputs, outputs, or logs are missing
private clinical data or unpublished data lack explicit local handling boundaries
the result is being used to claim mechanism, causality, clinical utility, or publication readiness without independent validation
workflow version, profile, container image, or input manifest is missing
required_run_evidence_before_packet: exact command or GUI action log
evidence_boundary: Launcher plan only; this is not an executed software run or scientific result.
